title: Fixman 190368 Packing Tape 48 mm x 66m Brown
features: Biaxially-oriented polypropylene film coated with acrylic-based adhesive
Used for carton sealing and general packaging
description: From the manufacturer Fixman 190368 Brown Adhesive Packing Tape 48mm x 66m Manufacturer's Description Fixman’s Brown Adhesive Packing Tape is ultra-strong and very long, with a pressure-sensitive acrylic-based adhesive so it sticks to cardboard and paper securely and reliably. Biaxially-orientated (it stretches 2 ways), Fixman Packing Tape sticks to items such as parcels, packing boxes, carton sealing and general packing. It peels cleanly without tearing, making it an essential component of any office, household, garden, warehouse or workshop. This packing tape offers consistent and reliable performance in a wide range of environments and for a variety of applications. It's excellent quality, lightweight and offers great tear resistance. The roll fits standard tape guns or can be used independently of a tape gun, using scissors to cut it to the right length. Ideal for packing, shipping and storage, you won’t come unstuck with this tough and long-lasting tape. - Biaxially-oriented polypropylene film coated with acrylic-based adhesive - Good tear resistance - Used for carton sealing and general packaging - Roll fits standard tape guns - 40 mic peel adhesion = 4.8 N/25 mm Technical Specifications Measures (W x L): 48 mm x 66m Finish: 40 microns Colour: Buff brown
